TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ya-sun-sen šļěśĚĺś£ģ == Ya-sun-sen " Si-pan-ya kamu : Asunci√≥n, ngiha nu Si-pan-ya :(asun'sjon) u Pa-la-kuy tukay, tademaw nu henin 525,252 ku tademaw "tusepcaylim mihcaan" itida i nan-wi 25.2667¬į, si-cin 57.6667¬į. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy sawac nu kawili sadipasan, u Pa-la-kuy a angangangan nu minatu atu kakulian, tatelungan nu lalangawan, kakulian angangangan u kakanen a kakakukulian, atu tatatenunan a kakulian atu tatabakuan a kakulian. šļěśĚĺś£ģ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Asunci√≥n,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(asun'sjon)) . Ya-sun-sen u ce-ce-se', caay kaw nu canan a cuoan. tabakiay a tukayan u Ta-ya-sun-sen han. Ya-sun-sen patidengan i caylimlupic mihcaan walu a bulad caylim demiad, u Nan-mem-cuo satenesay nu likisian a tukayan, si pangangangan han tu Nan-mem-cuo a " wina nu tukay", tadangangan naw Nuestra Se√Īora de la Asunci√≥n "tayda i tapukuan ni Maliya". Caywallimsiw mihcaan namaka Pa-la-kuy kalepacawan nanidebungan nu Pa-si hitay, katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan Pa-si hitay hida satu a taluma' ku nuheni. ",ŚéüŚźćÁāļNuestra Se√Īora de la Asunci√≥n .1869 . Ing-cung samian u mitudungan tu Pa-li nu hitayan nisaadidian a luma'an, micapiay u tatelungan nu macian, caysiwpicsep mihcaan atu caysiwwalsep mihcaan misaahebal tu W-lu-kua-ya putah, tastaseng ku malumanay a tukay, ayda ya malumanay mapeci' henay, sakatalawan sa tu labii. kapah ku inakaan a luma'an, u siidaay nu Pa-la-kuy ku muenengay, idaw ku tabakiay nu patiyamay, cacakayan. CONMEBOL a hunbu itida i Ya-sun-sen capi nu Lu-ke'. idaw ku nakamuan saan Ya-sun-sen u sakay hekal a kanatalan nu taydaay midang nu sayasuyay a tukayan. .CONMEBOL . Ya-sun-sen itida i Nan-cuy-ti-cun amisan nutipan kapulungan nu iciba ni kalepacawan a kitidaan, milaad tu Ta-si-yeng caylusepsep kun-li, milaad tu Tay-pin-yeng caysepsepsep kun-li. ilabu nu Ya-sun-sen idaw ku sasing nu Cung-hua-min-kuo Cen-cung-cen atu Cen-ce-se dadan. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy "Paraguayan War" singangan tu tulu ka pulungan a kalepacaw " War of the Triple Alliance" , u caywallimsip mihcaan katukuh caywalpicsep mihcaan, Pa-la-kuy atu tuluay a kanatalan " A-ken-ten, Pa-si-ti-kuo atu W-la-kuy" tunikalepacawan. uyni u La-tin-mem-cuo nu sakay likisian u sakalabadesan, u sakatalawan ni kalepacawan, mahiniay a nikalepacawan misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy tadamalibalucu', tadamawada' ku tademaw nu Pa-la-kuy " ini i nikacinglawan nu sulitan, tatengaay a nikapatayan caay ka tinengngi", ina Pa-la-kuy ales han tu nuheni ku A-kin-tin atu Pa-si a lalaan. nina ni kalepacawan kalingatuan i caywalnemsip mihcaan tu hedek, lingatu han namakayda i W-la-kuy sa macalap ku Pa-la-kuy atu Pa-si nikalawlawan. caywalnemlim mihcaan, A-ken-tin atu W-la-kuy micumud misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy a milepacaw, sisa ninakalepacawan pangangan han " tulu a kanatal nikalepacawan". ". kademecan ni kalepacawan tu Pa-la-kuy hatida tu sa. Pa-la-kuy tina kalepacawan hinademec, milihida tu miwawies, uynihan tu u kalabadesan a nikalepacawan, sisa Pa-la-kuy hitay atu binawlan katuud ku mapatayay i nikalepacawan, mapateluh atu imelang aibalucu' han tu. mahiniay a nikalepacawan matulin tu sabaw sepat a bulad, katukuh i caywalpicsep mihcaan tulu a bulad cacay a demiad, Fuo-lan-si-ke.Suo-la-nuo.Luo-pae-se cung-tun itida i Say-luo-kaw-la nikalepacawan patayen nu Pa-si a hitay. A-ken-tin atu Pa-si hitay debungan ku Pa-la-kuy katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu Pa-la-kuy makaala tu 2.1wang atu tusep a wang nu tademawan. sipakayda nu Pa-la-kuy tu pinatu a mihcaan nikalawlawan atu kalawpesan tu tademaw haymaw sa a masasa. . caysiwsipsep mihcaan a Ya-sun-sen 1940ŚĻīÁöĄšļěśĚĺś£ģ Ya-sun-sen naw Ing-ti-an tademaw Kua-la-ni binacadan a niyadu'an, caylimtulim mihcaan u Pu-taw-ya tademaw ci Ya-li-he.Cya-si-ya ku makaadihay, caylimlupic mihcaan Si-pan-ya ku mikuwanay a patideng tu Ya-sun-sen-se. pangangan han nu Nan-mem-cuo u "wina nu tukay". caylimwalsep mihcaan malaNan-mem-la-pu-la-ta cungtu tatelungan nu tukayan. caywalcaycay mihcaan, misiteked ku Pa-la-kuy, malatukay ku Ya-sun-sen. kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy, debungan nu Pa-si, A-ken-tin,W-la-kuy tulu a kanatalan ku Ya-sun-sen, u Pa-si ku mikuwanay katukuh tu caywalpicnem mihcaan. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy kauyli sawacan, itida i Pi-ke-ma-ye-sawac atu Pa-la-kuy-sawac nu nikalalitemuhan a masaenalay nu kitidaan. saan namaka Ke-pen dimiad a nikakenihan, Ya-sun-sen u hinaudaday tu laludan diheku ku senged, caledes ku lalud, sapi' ku kasienawan, yadah ku udad tu mihcaan, u senged ku yadahay. Ya-sun-sen diheku ku demiad, caay henay kasisuleda, nika kasienawan a nikasisuledaan nasisuleda tu sa ku nikilukan, aydaay a nikasisuledaan a nikilukan i caypiclimcay mihcaan enem a buladan. 1751ŚĻī6śúą.
S.PHON: == ja-sun-s…ôn *** == ja-sun-s…ôn " si-pan-ja kamu : asun ¶i*n, Ňčińßa nu si-pan-ja :(asun Ē~ °sjon) u pa-r~…ĺa-kuj tukaj, tad…ômaw nu ńß…ônin ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan" itida i nan-wi **.*****, si- ¶in **.*****. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…ĺa-kuj sawa ¶ nu kawir~…ĺi sadipasan, u pa-r~…ĺa-kuj a aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu minatu atu kakur~…ĺian, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kakur~…ĺian aŇčaŇčaŇčan u kakan…ôn a kakakukur~…ĺian, atu tatat…ônunan a kakur~…ĺian atu tatabakuan a kakur~…ĺian. ***(****:asun ¶i*n,******:(asun Ē~ °sjon)) . ja-sun-s…ôn u ¶…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô Ē~ °, ¶aaj kaw nu ¶anan a ¶uoan. tabakiaj a tukajan u ta-ja-sun-s…ôn ńßan. ja-sun-s…ôn patid…ôŇčan i ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad, u nan-m…ôm- ¶uo sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisian a tukajan, si paŇčaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo a " wina nu tukaj", tadaŇčaŇčan naw nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…ĺa asun ¶i*n "tajda i tapukuan ni mar~…ĺija". ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺimsiw mińß ¶aan namaka pa-r~…ĺa-kuj kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nanid…ôbuŇčan nu pa-si ńßitaj, katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan pa-si ńßitaj ńßida satu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku nuńß…ôni. ",***nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…ĺa asun ¶i*n .**** . iŇč- ¶uŇč samian u mituduŇčan tu pa-r~…ĺi nu ńßitajan nisaadidian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, mi ¶apiaj u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶ian, ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan atu ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu w-r~…ĺu-kua-ja putańß, tastas…ôŇč ku mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj, ajda ja mar~…ĺumanaj map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj, sakatar~…ĺawan sa tu r~…ĺabii. kapańß ku inakaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, u siidaaj nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj, idaw ku tabakiaj nu patijamaj, ¶a ¶akajan. ¶onm…ôbor~…ĺ a ńßunbu itida i ja-sun-s…ôn ¶api nu r~…ĺu-k…ô Ē~ °. idaw ku nakamuan saan ja-sun-s…ôn u sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺan nu tajdaaj midaŇč nu sajasujaj a tukajan. . ¶onm…ôbor~…ĺ . ja-sun-s…ôn itida i nan- ¶uj-ti- ¶un amisan nutipan kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu i ¶iba ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a kitidaan, mir~…ĺaad tu ta-si-j…ôŇč ¶ajr~…ĺus…ôps…ôp kun-r~…ĺi, mir~…ĺaad tu taj-pin-j…ôŇč ¶ajs…ôps…ôps…ôp kun-r~…ĺi. ir~…ĺabu nu ja-sun-s…ôn idaw ku sasiŇč nu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo ¶…ôn- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-s…ô dadan. . r~…ĺikisi** kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj "paraguajan war" siŇčaŇčan tu tur~…ĺu ka pur~…ĺuŇčan a kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw " war of tńß…ô tripr~…ĺ…ô ar~…ĺr~…ĺian ¶…ô" , u ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺimsip mińß ¶aan katukuńß ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan, pa-r~…ĺa-kuj atu tur~…ĺuaj a kanatar~…ĺan " a-k…ôn-t…ôn, pa-si-ti-kuo atu w-r~…ĺa-kuj" tunikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. ujni u r~…ĺa-tin-m…ôm- ¶uo nu sakaj r~…ĺikisian u sakar~…ĺabad…ôsan, u sakatar~…ĺawan ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, mańßiniaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan misuajaw tu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj tadamar~…ĺibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, tadamawada Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj " ini i nika ¶iŇčr~…ĺawan nu sur~…ĺitan, tat…ôŇčaaj a nikapatajan ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇčŇči", ina pa-r~…ĺa-kuj ar~…ĺ…ôs ńßan tu nuńß…ôni ku a-kin-tin atu pa-si a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. nina ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan kar~…ĺiŇčatuan i ¶ajwar~…ĺn…ômsip mińß ¶aan tu ńß…ôd…ôk, r~…ĺiŇčatu ńßan namakajda i w-r~…ĺa-kuj sa ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku pa-r~…ĺa-kuj atu pa-si nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan. ¶ajwar~…ĺn…ômr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, a-k…ôn-tin atu w-r~…ĺa-kuj mi ¶umud misuajaw tu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj a mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, sisa ninakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan paŇčaŇčan ńßan " tur~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺ nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan". ". kad…ôm…ô ¶an ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj ńßatida tu sa. pa-r~…ĺa-kuj tina kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan ńßinad…ôm…ô ¶, mir~…ĺińßida tu miwawi…ôs, ujnińßan tu u kar~…ĺabad…ôsan a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, sisa pa-r~…ĺa-kuj ńßitaj atu binawr~…ĺan katuud ku mapatajaj i nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, mapat…ôr~…ĺuńß atu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč aibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßan tu. mańßiniaj a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan matur~…ĺin tu sabaw s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad, katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, fuo-r~…ĺan-si-k…ô.suo-r~…ĺa-nuo.r~…ĺuo-pa…ô-s…ô ¶uŇč-tun itida i saj-r~…ĺuo-kaw-r~…ĺa nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan pataj…ôn nu pa-si a ńßitaj. a-k…ôn-tin atu pa-si ńßitaj d…ôbuŇčan ku pa-r~…ĺa-kuj katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj makaar~…ĺa tu *.*waŇč atu tus…ôp a waŇč nu tad…ômawan. sipakajda nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj tu pinatu a mińß ¶aan nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan atu kar~…ĺawp…ôsan tu tad…ômaw ńßajmaw sa a masasa. . ¶ajsiwsips…ôp mińß ¶aan a ja-sun-s…ôn ********* ja-sun-s…ôn naw iŇč-ti-an tad…ômaw kua-r~…ĺa-ni bina ¶adan a nijadu Ē~ °an, ¶ajr~…ĺimtur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-ńß…ô. ¶ja-si-ja ku makaadińßaj, ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan si-pan-ja ku mikuwanaj a patid…ôŇč tu ja-sun-s…ôn-s…ô. paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo u "wina nu tukaj". ¶ajr~…ĺimwar~…ĺs…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺanan-m…ôm-r~…ĺa-pu-r~…ĺa-ta ¶uŇčtu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu tukajan. ¶ajwar~…ĺ ¶aj ¶aj mińß ¶aan, misit…ôk…ôd ku pa-r~…ĺa-kuj, mar~…ĺatukaj ku ja-sun-s…ôn. kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj, d…ôbuŇčan nu pa-si, a-k…ôn-tin,w-r~…ĺa-kuj tur~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺan ku ja-sun-s…ôn, u pa-si ku mikuwanaj katukuńß tu ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…ĺa-kuj kaujr~…ĺi sawa ¶an, itida i pi-k…ô-ma-j…ô-sawa ¶ atu pa-r~…ĺa-kuj-sawa ¶ nu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu kitidaan. saan namaka k…ô-p…ôn dimiad a nikak…ônińßan, ja-sun-s…ôn u ńßinaudadaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺudan dińß…ôku ku s…ôŇč…ôd, ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku r~…ĺar~…ĺud, sapi Ē~ ° ku kasi…ônawan, jadańß ku udad tu mińß ¶aan, u s…ôŇč…ôd ku jadańßaj. ja-sun-s…ôn dińß…ôku ku d…ômiad, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kasisur~…ĺ…ôda, nika kasi…ônawan a nikasisur~…ĺ…ôdaan nasisur~…ĺ…ôda tu sa ku nikir~…ĺukan, ajdaaj a nikasisur~…ĺ…ôdaan a nikir~…ĺukan i ¶ajpi ¶r~…ĺim ¶aj mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺadan. *******.
S.FORM: == Ya-sun-sen šļěśĚĺś£ģ == Ya-sun-sen " Si-pan-ya kamu : Asunci√≥n, ngiha nu Si-pan-ya :(asun'sjon) u Pa-la-kuy tukay, tademaw nu henin 525,252 ku tademaw "tusepcaylim mihcaan" itida i nan-wi 25.2667¬į, si-cin 57.6667¬į. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy sawac nu kawili sadipasan, u Pa-la-kuy a angangangan nu minatu atu kakulian, tatelungan nu lalangawan, kakulian angangangan u kakanen a kakakukulian, atu tatatenunan a kakulian atu tatabakuan a kakulian. šļěśĚĺś£ģ(Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ě:Asunci√≥n,Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČôŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(asun'sjon)) . Ya-sun-sen u ce-ce-se', caay kaw nu canan a cuoan. tabakiay a tukayan u Ta-ya-sun-sen han. Ya-sun-sen patidengan i caylimlupic mihcaan walu a bulad caylim demiad, u Nan-mem-cuo satenesay nu likisian a tukayan, si pangangangan han tu Nan-mem-cuo a " wina nu tukay", tadangangan naw Nuestra Se√Īora de la Asunci√≥n "tayda i tapukuan ni Maliya". Caywallimsiw mihcaan namaka Pa-la-kuy kalepacawan nanidebungan nu Pa-si hitay, katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan Pa-si hitay hida satu a taluma' ku nuheni. ",ŚéüŚźćÁāļNuestra Se√Īora de la Asunci√≥n .1869 . Ing-cung samian u mitudungan tu Pa-li nu hitayan nisaadidian a luma'an, micapiay u tatelungan nu macian, caysiwpicsep mihcaan atu caysiwwalsep mihcaan misaahebal tu W-lu-kua-ya putah, tastaseng ku malumanay a tukay, ayda ya malumanay mapeci' henay, sakatalawan sa tu labii. kapah ku inakaan a luma'an, u siidaay nu Pa-la-kuy ku muenengay, idaw ku tabakiay nu patiyamay, cacakayan. CONMEBOL a hunbu itida i Ya-sun-sen capi nu Lu-ke'. idaw ku nakamuan saan Ya-sun-sen u sakay hekal a kanatalan nu taydaay midang nu sayasuyay a tukayan. .CONMEBOL . Ya-sun-sen itida i Nan-cuy-ti-cun amisan nutipan kapulungan nu iciba ni kalepacawan a kitidaan, milaad tu Ta-si-yeng caylusepsep kun-li, milaad tu Tay-pin-yeng caysepsepsep kun-li. ilabu nu Ya-sun-sen idaw ku sasing nu Cung-hua-min-kuo Cen-cung-cen atu Cen-ce-se dadan. . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy "Paraguayan War" singangan tu tulu ka pulungan a kalepacaw " War of the Triple Alliance" , u caywallimsip mihcaan katukuh caywalpicsep mihcaan, Pa-la-kuy atu tuluay a kanatalan " A-ken-ten, Pa-si-ti-kuo atu W-la-kuy" tunikalepacawan. uyni u La-tin-mem-cuo nu sakay likisian u sakalabadesan, u sakatalawan ni kalepacawan, mahiniay a nikalepacawan misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy tadamalibalucu', tadamawada' ku tademaw nu Pa-la-kuy " ini i nikacinglawan nu sulitan, tatengaay a nikapatayan caay ka tinengngi", ina Pa-la-kuy ales han tu nuheni ku A-kin-tin atu Pa-si a lalaan. nina ni kalepacawan kalingatuan i caywalnemsip mihcaan tu hedek, lingatu han namakayda i W-la-kuy sa macalap ku Pa-la-kuy atu Pa-si nikalawlawan. caywalnemlim mihcaan, A-ken-tin atu W-la-kuy micumud misuayaw tu Pa-la-kuy a milepacaw, sisa ninakalepacawan pangangan han " tulu a kanatal nikalepacawan". ". kademecan ni kalepacawan tu Pa-la-kuy hatida tu sa. Pa-la-kuy tina kalepacawan hinademec, milihida tu miwawies, uynihan tu u kalabadesan a nikalepacawan, sisa Pa-la-kuy hitay atu binawlan katuud ku mapatayay i nikalepacawan, mapateluh atu imelang aibalucu' han tu. mahiniay a nikalepacawan matulin tu sabaw sepat a bulad, katukuh i caywalpicsep mihcaan tulu a bulad cacay a demiad, Fuo-lan-si-ke.Suo-la-nuo.Luo-pae-se cung-tun itida i Say-luo-kaw-la nikalepacawan patayen nu Pa-si a hitay. A-ken-tin atu Pa-si hitay debungan ku Pa-la-kuy katukuh i caywalpiclim mihcaan. saan ku ni sausian, nikasipunan nu Pa-la-kuy makaala tu 2.1wang atu tusep a wang nu tademawan. sipakayda nu Pa-la-kuy tu pinatu a mihcaan nikalawlawan atu kalawpesan tu tademaw haymaw sa a masasa. . caysiwsipsep mihcaan a Ya-sun-sen 1940ŚĻīÁöĄšļěśĚĺś£ģ Ya-sun-sen naw Ing-ti-an tademaw Kua-la-ni binacadan a niyadu'an, caylimtulim mihcaan u Pu-taw-ya tademaw ci Ya-li-he.Cya-si-ya ku makaadihay, caylimlupic mihcaan Si-pan-ya ku mikuwanay a patideng tu Ya-sun-sen-se. pangangan han nu Nan-mem-cuo u "wina nu tukay". caylimwalsep mihcaan malaNan-mem-la-pu-la-ta cungtu tatelungan nu tukayan. caywalcaycay mihcaan, misiteked ku Pa-la-kuy, malatukay ku Ya-sun-sen. kalepacawan nu Pa-la-kuy, debungan nu Pa-si, A-ken-tin,W-la-kuy tulu a kanatalan ku Ya-sun-sen, u Pa-si ku mikuwanay katukuh tu caywalpicnem mihcaan. Ya-sun-sen itida i Pa-la-kuy kauyli sawacan, itida i Pi-ke-ma-ye-sawac atu Pa-la-kuy-sawac nu nikalalitemuhan a masaenalay nu kitidaan. saan namaka Ke-pen dimiad a nikakenihan, Ya-sun-sen u hinaudaday tu laludan diheku ku senged, caledes ku lalud, sapi' ku kasienawan, yadah ku udad tu mihcaan, u senged ku yadahay. Ya-sun-sen diheku ku demiad, caay henay kasisuleda, nika kasienawan a nikasisuledaan nasisuleda tu sa ku nikilukan, aydaay a nikasisuledaan a nikilukan i caypiclimcay mihcaan enem a buladan. 1751ŚĻī6śúą.
S.PHON: == ja-sun-s…ôn *** == ja-sun-s…ôn " si-pan-ja kamu : asun ¶i*n, Ňčińßa nu si-pan-ja :(asun Ē~ °sjon) u pa-r~…ĺa-kuj tukaj, tad…ômaw nu ńß…ônin ***,*** ku tad…ômaw "tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan" itida i nan-wi **.*****, si- ¶in **.*****. ja-sun-s…ôn itida i pa-r~…ĺa-kuj sawa ¶ nu kawir~…ĺi sadipasan, u pa-r~…ĺa-kuj a aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu minatu atu kakur~…ĺian, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, kakur~…ĺian aŇčaŇčaŇčan u kakan…ôn a kakakukur~…ĺian, atu tatat…ônunan a kakur~…ĺian atu tatabakuan a kakur~…ĺian. ***(****:asun ¶i*n,******:(asun Ē~ °sjon)) . ja-sun-s…ôn u ¶…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô Ē~ °, ¶aaj kaw nu ¶anan a ¶uoan. tabakiaj a tukajan u ta-ja-sun-s…ôn ńßan. ja-sun-s…ôn patid…ôŇčan i ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad, u nan-m…ôm- ¶uo sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisian a tukajan, si paŇčaŇčaŇčan ńßan tu nan-m…ôm- ¶uo a " wina nu tukaj", tadaŇčaŇčan naw nu…ôstra s…ô*ora d…ô r~…ĺa asun ¶i*n "tajda i tapukuan ni mar~…ĺija". ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺimsiw mińß ¶aan namaka pa-r~…ĺa-kuj kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nanid…ôbuŇčan nu pa-si ńßitaj, katukuńß i ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan pa-si ńßitaj ńßida satu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku nuńß…ôni.
